title: spergularia marginata subsp. tunetana
intro: Spergularia marginata subsp. tunetana, also known as Tunetian sand-spurrey, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and narrow leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spergularia marginata subsp. tunetana are said to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
